hooks.command: f=$(grep -o '"file_path":"[^"]*"' | head -1 | sed 's/.*:"//;s/"$//'); case "$f" in *.sh) command -v shellcheck >/dev/null 2>&1 && shellcheck --severity=warning "$f" ;; *.ps1) command -v pwsh >/dev/null 2>&1 && pwsh -NoProfile -Command "Invoke-ScriptAnalyzer -Path '$f' -Severity Warning,Error" ;; esac 2>/dev/null || true
